case_title: YERBA BUENA CONMMON ASSOCIATES INC VS. KENNETH SIMPSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: POS OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA CONMMON ASSOCIATES INC
